user.title: Bravia TV (gRPC)
user.description: Enter the IP address of your BRAVIA TV. The gRPC control port is discovered automatically.

oauth.title: Sign in to Sony
oauth.description:
1. **[Open the Sony sign-in page]({auth_url})** in a **desktop browser** (not the phone that has BRAVIA Connect) and log in with the Sony account paired to your TV.
2. Sign-in redirects to an `ssh-app://signin?code=…` address; the page will look like it failed — that’s expected.
3. Copy that full `ssh-app://…` address and paste it below. If the address bar doesn’t show it, open the browser’s DevTools (F12) → **Network** tab and copy the `Location` header of the last `302` request. Pasting just the `code=…` value also works.

error.no_grpc_service: Could not find the gRPC control service on that host. Make sure the TV is on and reachable.
error.oauth_failed: The Sony login redirect could not be validated. Try again.
error.pairing_failed: Pairing failed while fetching device keys. See the logs for details.

abort.wrong_account: Those credentials are for a different TV. Sign in with the Sony account paired to this TV.
abort.not_a_tv: That device is a Sony soundbar, not a TV. This integration controls BRAVIA TVs; use the Bravia Theatre (bravia_quad) integration for the soundbar.

init.title: Bravia TV options
init.description: The gRPC control port is discovered automatically. Set it here only if discovery fails on your network and you know the TV's current port; 0 restores automatic discovery.

exec_rejected.message: The TV rejected the change to {path}. It may not be available in the current context (for example the setting's input, app, or audio output isn't active).

grpc_port_unreachable.title: Bravia TV not reachable
grpc_port_unreachable.description: Home Assistant couldn't find the Sony gRPC control service on {host}. Make sure the TV is powered on and on the same network. If mDNS and port scanning are blocked on your network, set the port manually in the integration's options (Settings > Devices & Services > Bravia TV > Configure).
